_comment: Qmonster reads the `model` key from your real Claude Code settings file at ~/.claude/settings.json (the location src/policy/claude_settings.rs defaults to). This file in config/ is only a reference template showing the expected shape — do NOT copy it to config/claude-settings.json, Qmonster will not read from there. Other settings.json keys are ignored by Qmonster; safe to keep them alongside `model`.
